steps.title: Use the three viewpoints
steps.content: The text explains that the novel has one section from Mina's perspective, one from Jun's, and one from Nora's. The blank must describe perspectives that are separate from one another.

steps.title: Reject mismatched meanings
steps.content: Choice B would imply the perspectives were demanded, but no requirement is mentioned. Choice C suggests the perspectives were unplanned, which the text does not support. Choice D conflicts with the text because the perspectives are explicitly named. The answer is A.
